entry.title: Re: From Application Logging to Cloud Logging: Service Innovation Guide
entry.content:
@mohit_bansal3 would you please explain what do you mean by custom metrics ? its all about ingest URL afaik . Cloud Foundry just streams all the logs into the ingest URL , be the instance created directly in your sub account or shared from another sub account - what am I missing ? 

also can you paste the log drain URL you use, removing the credentials from it ? 

 

@yyertuganov can we see the mta.yaml , details of UPS ( screenshot or so ). ?

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive Guide to Unit Testing in CAP
entry.content: @VishalKwatra I achieved what I was looking for , thank you .

entry.title: Re: Update the dimension member in a transactional record...
entry.content:
@saikhancs35 

Not sure but I think you have over simplified your example. From your example it just looks like a copy from # to MD01 for Dim A. You could just use a copy data action to do so and specify in the rule. You can delete the # data after copy if required.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Ratings on Compensation Worksheet appearing in Decima...
entry.content:
Hi @bankarmanokam 

Please find below the reply from our product team :

Rating type should not be default in comp. If rating is pulled from overall competency section then comp configuration should point to it specifically.

Let me know if it fixes the issue after you change default and then relaunch worksheets.

Thanks

Xavier

entry.title: AWS Mail configuration for SAP ABAP Systems
entry.content:
Introduction:-

If you have moved your SAP system to AWS, you may want to eliminate some mail servers that are still operating on-premises or avoid the deployment of an EC2 instance dedicated to running an SMTP (Simple Mail Transfer Protocol) server. Sending outgoing emails is one of the most common requirements when running a SAP system. These emails can come from a variety of sources, including workflows, batch processing and process chains, monitoring and alerting etc.

Amazon Simple Email Service (SES)

Customers can send emails from within any application with Amazon Simple Email Service (SES), which is affordable, flexible, and scalable. You can quickly configure Amazon SES to support a variety of email use cases, such as transactional, marketing, or mass email communications. In this blog, we'll walk you through the necessary steps to set up outbound mail from a SAP ABAP system using Amazon SES (Simple Email Service) service. 

Prerequisites:-

In order to do preliminary testing, we will first set up a "Sandbox" account in Amazon SES and confirm a sender email address.  All emails originating from our SAP systems will be accepted by the SES service once all setup procedures have been completed successfully and this account has been converted to production.

Go to Amazon SES in the AWS EC2 Console, choose Email Addresses, and then click "Verify a New Email Address."  Please check your mail inbox after entering your email address and clicking Verify This Email Address.

After the validation is completed, the Status will change to green

Once the email address verification is completed, we need to create proper SMTP credentials which will be used by our SAP systems. To create the credentials, click on “SMTP Settings” and press the “Create My SMTP Credentials” button.

Note the Server Name as it will be required afterwards during the SAP system configuration

Enter a username and click on create bottom in the bottom

Download the SMTP username and password credentials in a csv file

SAP ABAP Outbound Email Configuration:-

Go to ABAP system and call transaction SCOT, select the SMTP nodes, and create a new one via the wizard

Click on the settings button, and provide the credentials generated in the previous steps

Download the certificate from the Amazon SES SMTP endpoint (for example using this cmd line on a Linux system : openssl s_client -starttls smtp -connect email-smtp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com:587 | sed -ne ‘/-BEGIN CERTIFICATE-/,/-END CERTIFICATE-/p’)

Note: the Amazon SES endpoints are region dependent, so please ensure you are using the one within the same region.

In transaction STRUST, import the certificate into the SSL client (Standard) and restart the service via SMICM

Check outbound email:-

In transaction SO01, create a test email and press the send button

In transaction SOST, We can trigger a send job via menu Send Request à Start Send Process for Selection.

Conclusion:-

In this blog, we have demonstrated how to set up SAP ABAP systems to send out emails, which is a frequent requirement from the standpoints of business processes and base operations.

Related information:-

https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/awsforsap/category/sap/ 

https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/awsforsap/simplify-sap-jobs-scheduling-using-aws-native-tooling/ 

Please share your feedback and your thoughts. Write back to me for questions and queries.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: AWS Mail configuration for SAP ABAP Systems
entry.content: Thanks for sharing valuable content.

entry.title: Re: Become an SAP Certified Development Associate - SAP Integration Suite: New Certification out no
entry.content: This blog post is now outdated. For the most up to date information about the SAP Integration Suite certification and learning resources to help you prepare, check out this blog post.

entry.title: Data import of Local Currency only in the measure based model in SAC Analytical Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

Heed your expertise with the below query in new measure based model.

Requirement: Users have to collect the Actuals data with both Local Currency and Group Currency  and Plan data is to be collected at Local Currency and that gets converted to Group Currency using conversion mechanism in the SAC

Model defined: Owing to the given requirement , We have created 2 Measure in the Model(New Model) Called LC and GC. We are able to upload the LC and GC in the actual Version, But when we tried to load the plan data containing only LC value through flat file, it is asking us to even map the GC measure and due to which it is throwing an error called" This model required all the measure to be mapped" not allowing us to load the data.

 

Query:

Is this behavior is by design or it is something influence due to some setting?

If this is by design, then SAC restricting the users to load the selected measure (Either LC or GC or Quantity) making an restricting on the process normally allowing different users to load different type of measure.

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP Community
entry.content: Welcome to the SAP Community, it is great to have you here! 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Smart Tree Control consuming CDS generated Odata

entry.title: Re: Expose S/4 HANA cloud CDS views in to HANA express ed...
entry.content: Closing this thread. @former_member198674 Feel free to post a new question if needed.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisitions in the project
entry.content: You will need to use 2 different Networks with the Collective Requisition turned on in config, 1 for BOM and 1 for Direct Procurement.  Assign the components to the different Network Activities.

entry.title: Invoice Not Parking against Scheduling Agreement Freight Condition
entry.content:
EDI invoices park against freight condition on standard purchase orders because the invoice vendor is different from the purchase order vendor. 

EDI invoices are parking against the goods on a scheduling agreement. 

Can someone help me understand what I am missing to get the invoice to park with the reference purchase order freight condition on a scheduling agreement?

entry.title: Re: KCH2 PROFIT CENTRE GROUP CTREATION
entry.content: Already answered: https://www.google.com/search?q=%22kch2%22+%22function+is+not+allowed+in+the+standard+hierarchy%22%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: Project Change Request Feature/APP/Functionality (Por...
entry.content: You are correct, the CPM PICM does everything you ask.  A PPM project can be assigned to a CPM Master Project where you can use the robust PICM (Project Issue and Change Management) capabilities.  There is nothing in standard PPM that does the same thing.

entry.title: Re: SAP EPPM public cloud
entry.content: Please provide more details about your business requirements.

entry.title: 🇵🇱 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Warsaw, Poland)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Tuesday 1 April 2025 in Warsaw, Poland  from 14:00 - 19:00 GMT+1. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: KMD Poland, Inflancka 4a, Warszawa.

The instructor is Ingo Braeuninger

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

The event is kindly being hosted by Develite IT Solutions, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: "This message is from an external sender" creates folder in clients mail box
entry.content:
Hello Raymond,

Thanks for your response.

In SAP, we trigger PDF invoices to the user's email ID from VA02 VA01 transactions. The invoices are generated using a Smart Form and sent via the CL_BCS class (SAP Abap coding).

SAP to Gamil

 

 

SAP to Our Outlook PDF is coming as below:

SAP to USER

We tested the same process with Gmail, company email IDs, and client email IDs, and in all cases, the PDF was received as a direct attachment without a folder. I have attached images as examples.

However, only this specific user is receiving the PDF inside a folder. this user's email domain is already maintained in SCOT, but he is receiving mails as "External sender".

I believe these two messages are creating folder.

“This message is from external sender”

“This message came from outside your organization”

Unfortunately, we do not have full permission to check the user's Outlook settings, which is why we are attempting to reproduce the issue in our own Outlook environment.

entry.title: Re: Linking of activities and milestones in Project Syste...
entry.content:
1.  There are only WBS in Public Cloud.  As of 2502 you can create milestones at the WBS level.

2.  It is on the roadmap to connect WBS milestones to a Sales Order. Scheduled for Q1 2026.  Currently the billing plan on the SO is maintained separately. 

3.  No standard functionality, you can look into creating a BPA in BTP to create many Project Demands.

4.  In Public Cloud Enterprise Project financial planning is carried out externally and uploaded into S/4HANA.

5.  Yes, you can use standard IM material movements.

entry.title: Re: "This message is from an external sender" creates fol...

Hello Raymond,

Thanks for your response.

In SAP, we trigger PDF invoices to the user's email ID from VA02 VA01 transactions. The invoices are generated using a Smart Form and sent via the CL_BCS class (SAP Abap coding).

SAP to Gamil

 

 

SAP to Our Outlook PDF is coming as below:

SAP to USER

We tested the same process with Gmail, company email IDs, and client email IDs, and in all cases, the PDF was received as a direct attachment without a folder. I have attached images as examples.

However, only this specific user is receiving the PDF inside a folder. this user's email domain is already maintained in SCOT, but he is receiving mails as "External sender".

I believe these two messages are creating folder.

“This message is from external sender”

“This message came from outside your organization”

Unfortunately, we do not have full permission to check the user's Outlook settings, which is why we are attempting to reproduce the issue in our own Outlook environment.

entry.title: Re: SAP view ”I_ProjectDemand" add field
entry.content: You should be able to connect through the ReferencedObjectUUID.

entry.title: SAC - Is there any way to change drill limitation in tables by scripting?
entry.content:
SAC has a limitation to show too many rows in a table. The default limit is 500 rows and 60 columns (30000 cells).

Can I set another limit or to set it unlimited by JS scripting? I mean something like "Table_1.[function]()..."

entry.title: Re: Error Message no. CJ055 'PEP element is already imputed and cannot be deleted'
entry.content: Are you trying to delete a WBS element? Are you in Public Cloud or Private Cloud/On-Prem or ECC?

entry.title: How to Handle BMR (Batch Manufacturing Record) pharma industry in SAP PP?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I have studied several blogs stating that BMR (Batch Manufacturing Record) can be managed through SAP PI Sheet. However, I came across information on the SAP Help Portal mentioning that PI sheets are not supported on Fiori.

Our client requires BMR to be managed within SAP PP. Can anyone suggest the best approach to handle BMR in SAP PP without using PI sheets on Fiori? Any guidance or alternative solutions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

@everyone @SAPPP @Pharma

entry.title: How to represent manual email one swimlane to another (within same pool) in Signavio Process Manager
entry.content:
How do I represent an Email sent from one department to another department. I tried using multiple variations send task and receive task; Send task and intermediate catching event.

But I keep getting Warning "Add missing message flow"

entry.title: SAP Forms Service by Adobe - REST API with SAP CAPM
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to use SAP Forms Service by Adobe - REST API with SAP CAPM service odata url.
Let me explain my scenerio :
Firstly, i will create Template in the Adobe Lifecycle designer.

Then from my SAP CAPM service i want to send the data through my odata srv to bind with the form template(xdp file) and generate pdf. 


I have configured SAP adobe form destination in my sap btp account.

I have follow many articles but they have only approach through ABAP and using S4HANA.
I want to implement that through SAP capm .

Regards,
Piyush

entry.title: Re: Enabling WEBGUI Firefighter in SAP GRC
entry.content:

But, after logging in via FF id from GRC to the WEBGUI, the Fiori page is displayed with a blank the screen (in the plug in system) . I suppose we have to create the fiori tile in the plugin system to point to this BW4WEB transaction. Is this the right understanding?

Would appreciate if you can share a note/kb article on this kind of configuration.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Maximum Compensation guidelines supported?
entry.content:
Hi @PoojaRane 

Is this box below checked ? "Enable guideline optimization" in Plan Setup > Settings.

Is there a way you could simplify the number of entries by placing the complexity in custom fields of the worksheet ? by having 71k guideline values you are running a high risk of poor performance issues, especially if UserID is used an attribute which I have documented here.

Finally comment from our product team: can they try adding the values to the template xml and importing the template itself.

 

 

Thanks

Xavier

entry.title: Recruiting Email Triggers
entry.content: I want to know if the triggers apply to all personnel requisitions?

entry.title: Re: XBLNR Down payment request
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @ACALVO .

In reports, automatic payments or payment advices, the alphanumeric reference document number, XBLNR, provided on supplier invoices or payment requests, may be referred to as simple text, e.g. as "Payment Reference", "Your invoice", "Your reference ID", etc.

If this helped answer your request, please mark this response accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Success factors Compensation and Bonus configurations
entry.content: @Sanjukta1 I don't think you will find much content on that. That's what the certification is for. All the best

I have verified the data in the template is accurate and represents an existing BP/role in the system. Any hints on the root cause of this error? Appreciate your inputs.

Regards,

Shiv

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Price Condition Showing Incorrect Value in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check you have maintained the condition record in the condition table and make sure condition record you have created is in validity of the pricing date of the sales order. Please provide some more additional details like what is the expectation and system is applying which step . 

Thanks, Sateesh Kankanampati

entry.title: IBP - Last Value in Period when Mid-Period
entry.content:
We are trying to show the last value in a period and this works for all but the current period - example attached of what we are trying to achieve.

The KF is stored at a technical week level and is being reported at a month level. The issue we are having is that for the current month, nothing is reported as the last technical week of that period is still NULL when we are mid-month. During the current month, we would like to report the current technical week's value.

We tried using IBP_LPA, but this resulted in a NULL current month as described above.

We also tried using IBP_LAST_VALUE, but due to having to choose an aggregation level for the REQUEST level, we could not get the result to be correct (for example, if we used MAX, it chose the MAX value over the period rather than the actual last populated value).

Has anyone been able to successfully make this situation work?

Thank you, in advance, for any assistance you can provide.

entry.title: Unable to consume from an OData V4 service using CAP Java
entry.content:
I created a full stack app in CAP using JAVA to consume from an existing OData service. I can consume from the standard business partner API by creating a projection on it. But, when I did the same thing for an OData V4 service( both custom OData V4 deployed in BTP and standard OData V4 service like Product, Bank), I get a 404 error when I tried to access the service. I have created custom handlers to handle the on read logic too but still get the same error.

Sample code using the Northwind OData V4 service

using { NorthWind } from './external/NorthWind';

entity my.app.Product as select from NorthWind.Products {
key ID,
@readonly Name,
@readonly Description,
@readonly Rating,
@readonly Price
};

@Path: 'nwind'
service NWindService {
entity Product as projection on my.app.Product;
}

Handler logic for read

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Qualifier;
import org.springframework.stereotype.Component;import com.sap.cds.Result;
import com.sap.cds.ql.Select;
import com.sap.cds.ql.cqn.CqnAnalyzer;
import com.sap.cds.ql.cqn.CqnSelect;
import com.sap.cds.reflect.CdsModel;
import com.sap.cds.services.cds.CdsReadEventContext;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.EventHandler;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.On;
import com.sap.cds.services.handler.annotations.ServiceName;

import cds.gen.northwind.NorthWind;
import cds.gen.northwind.NorthWind_;
import cds.gen.nwindservice.Product_;
import cds.gen.nwindservice.NWindService_;

@Component
@ServiceName(NWindService_.CDS_NAME)
public class NWindServiceHandler implements EventHandler {
private final NorthWind bupa;
private final CqnAnalyzer analyzer;
NWindServiceHandler(@Qualifier(NorthWind_.CDS_NAME) NorthWind bupa, CdsModel model) {
this.bupa = bupa;
this.analyzer = CqnAnalyzer.create(model);
}
@On(entity = Product_.CDS_NAME)
Result readProduct(CdsReadEventContext context) {
        Result products = bupa.run(context.getCqn());
return products;
}
}
 
application.yaml
---
spring:
  config.activate.on-profile: sandbox
cds:
  remote.services:
    '[NorthWind]':
      type: "odata-v4"
      destination:
        properties:
          url: "https://services.odata.org/experimental/OData/OData.svc/"
 
Error:

Exception marked the ChangeSet 4 as cancelled: The remote OData service responded with status code '404' (service 'NorthWind', event 'READ', entity 'NorthWind.Products')

2025-02-27T19:56:33.766Z ERROR 90246 --- [nio-8080-exec-3] c.s.c.a.o.v4.processors.CdsProcessor     : The remote OData service responded with status code '404' (service 'NorthWind', event 'READ', entity 'NorthWind.Products')

entry.title: Re: IBP XYZ Segmentation
entry.content: Once I also choose "Replace leading nulls with zeroes", the issue appears to have resolved itself.

entry.title: How to run an alvGrid in mb51 using BDC?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

How to run an alvGrid using mb51 using BDC?
After pressing 'Detailed List' button it shows me an alv if i run it with mb51, and a simple list if i run it with BDC.
so left - mb51, right - bdc

    perform bdc_dynpro      using 'RM07DOCS' '1000'.
    perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'BUDAT-HIGH'.
    perform bdc_field       using 'MATNR-LOW' gs_outtab1_alv-matnr_ext.
    perform bdc_field       using 'WERKS-LOW' gs_outtab1_alv-werks.
    perform bdc_field       using 'LGORT-LOW' gs_outtab1_alv-lgort.
    perform bdc_field       using 'CHARG-LOW' gs_outtab1_alv-charg.
    perform bdc_field       using 'BUDAT-LOW' low_budat.
    perform bdc_field       using 'BUDAT-HIGH' high_budat.
    perform bdc_field       using 'ALV_DEF' '/OSTATKI'.
    perform bdc_field       using 'DATABASE' 'X'.
    perform bdc_field       using 'PA_AISTR' 'SAP_MATBEL_MARI'.
    perform bdc_field       using 'PA_DBSTD' 'X'.
    perform bdc_field       using 'BDC_OKCODE' '=ONLI'.
*    perform BDC_DYNPRO      using 'SAPMSSY0' '0120'.
*    perform BDC_FIELD       using 'BDC_OKCODE' '=DETAIL'.
*    perform BDC_DYNPRO      using 'SAPMSSY0' '0120'.
*    perform BDC_FIELD       using 'BDC_OKCODE' '=&F03'.
    opt-dismode = 'E'.
    call transaction 'MB51' using lt_bdcdata  options from opt.

entry.title: Re: How to run an alvGrid in mb51 using BDC?
entry.content:
BDC is an obsolete term. It's been called "Batch Input" for a long time.

311440 - Batch input and controls - SAP for Me says:

Frontend "controls" (e.g. ALV Grid) are generally not capable of batch input...

entry.title: Re: Selection screen COOIS
entry.content: Link is broken.

entry.title: Re: From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Approach in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @roger_sainsbury, is there an alternative to achieve the business requirement from @RavdeepSingh that is cleaner than using the RAP Events suggested? Implementing the User Exit MV45AFZZ?

Many thanks and kind regards,

Christian

entry.title: The Looming Tariff Tsunami: Is Your Business Ready?
entry.content:
“Tariff” is fast becoming the word of the year.

And the treat of tariffs is for sure the most talked about topic in boardrooms all over the world as they become “the hammer” in many geopolitical conversations!

Why?

Because over the past decades we have built often complex supply chains that span continents, delivering goods with incredible speed and competitive prices. However, this complexity also introduces vulnerabilities, and recently, tariffs have emerged as a major disruptor.

The Ripple Effect of Tariffs

When tariffs hit, the impact reverberates throughout the entire supply chain. To make any profit at all, importers need to pass some (if not all) of the increased costs onto customers, often leading to reduced demand. Retailers are then forced to rethink sourcing strategies, re-evaluate supplier relationships, and overhaul inventory management practices. The numbers can be staggering, with some estimates suggesting potential annual cost increases of thousands of dollars for consumers.

Adding to the challenge, businesses are already facing rising administrative costs (which have risen 14% from 2023-2024), regulatory pressures and the looming uncertainty of future trade policies. Leaders are actively seeking ways to mitigate these overhead expenses. While options like nearshoring or exploring new sourcing routes might seem appealing, they often prove to be short-term fixes with their own set of risks.

Beyond Reactive Measures: Embracing Technology-Driven Resilience

Instead of simply reacting to tariff changes, companies need a more proactive, long-term strategy. This is where technology, particularly advanced supply chain management solutions, comes into play. By harnessing the power of end-to-end data visibility, artificial intelligence (AI), and automation, businesses can transform their supply chains into resilient assets. They can not only withstand disruptions but emerge stronger and more adaptable:

  • Scenario Planning: Model "what-if" scenarios to test different supply chain strategies before implementation. By developing contingency plans to address potential disruptions through alternate sourcing regions, logistics routes, and pricing models you can minimize tariff exposure.
  • Alternative Sourcing Strategies: Because tariffs depend on country of origin, many companies will seek alternative suppliers in regions not impacted. In fact, nearly one-third of businesses are pursuing a dual supply chain approach where they have both global and local options. Business Network collaboration platforms not only help identify potential suppliers at risk but also provide alternative sources of supply and collaborative tools to ensure rapid and precise management of disruptions.
  • Inventory Optimization: Identifying key products that can be purchased in advance of tariffs to bolster inventory and ensuring that they are positioned in key locations across the supply chain will help minimize the impact of looming tariffs. Studies show that top-performing supply chain organizations are investing in AI and machine learning at twice the rate of their lower-performing peers.
  • Enhanced Supply Chain Visibility: Real-time tracking of demand fluctuations, inventory levels, and logistical operations, allowing businesses to swiftly adjust their strategies in response to new tariffs or other disruptions. This allows you to diversify suppliers, optimize inventory placement, and adjust logistics to minimize the impact of tariffs.

A Smarter Path Forward

In this volatile trade environment, resilience, agility, and adaptability are no longer optional – they're essential. By embracing the right technology, businesses can maintain competitiveness and ensure that tariffs don't dictate their success.

Discover how SAP Business Suite can help your business be more resilient to business challenges and responsive to opportunities.

Follow me on Twitter.

entry.title: Re: 1 warehouse order for outbound with two activity areas
entry.content: @castin , yes will probably need the two storage types as it is a very different kind of storage. But you can still define the activity area to span across both storage types.

entry.title: Re: Join us on March 4th: The Future of AI for Talent Management Webinar
entry.content: @amphill great webinar this morning. will you be providing a recording or the slides from the presentation? thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAC - Is there any way to change drill limitation in...
entry.content:
Hi, 

No.

You could vote e.g. for this https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/281341/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: HR integration active along with the Create Employee option in Maintain Employee FIORI Ap
entry.content:
Is it possible to view "Create Employee" button in the FIORI App "Maintain Employee" when the HR Business Partner Integration Switch(HRALX-HRAC) is still active? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: HR integration active along with the Create Employee...
entry.content:
It is not possible.

To have HR integration active (employees replicated into S/4 from external source) and to create employees locally via "Maintain Employees" are mutually exclusive. Both cannot be used at the same time.

Documents like SAP note 3385503, below, approach this subject:

3385503 - Create button missing in Maintain Employees app

entry.title: abap bug MESSAGE shows wrong ID/class/number and navigate to wrong source position
entry.content:
I've got an ABAP program which sends a message with MESSAGE 'some text' TYPE 'E'.

Bug 1: when clicking the message to display a popup with the detailed information of the message, its content is wrong, there should be no message number and text should be "Character String as Message".

Bug 2: the button used to navigate to the ABAP source code position where the message is sent, goes to the wrong place (in fact it goes to the wrong message number/long text shown in the popup).

Any idea what the problem is and how to fix?

Thanks.

Sandra

Below are the program and function module to reproduce the bug.

Program:

 

REPORT.
PARAMETERS bug    RADIOBUTTON GROUP rb1 DEFAULT 'X'.
PARAMETERS no_bug RADIOBUTTON GROUP rb1.
AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
  CASE 'X'.
    WHEN no_bug.
      MESSAGE 'Message shown and correct detail popup shows "Character String as Message" and ABAP source code shown is this line' TYPE 'E'.
    WHEN bug.
      DATA(return) = VALUE string( ).
      CALL FUNCTION 'Z_ZSRO_MESSAGE_RAISING'
        IMPORTING  return = return
        EXCEPTIONS error  = 1.
      MESSAGE return TYPE 'E'.
  ENDCASE.

 

Function module:

 

FUNCTION Z_ZSRO_MESSAGE_RAISING
  EXPORTING
    RETURN TYPE STRING
  EXCEPTIONS
    ERROR.

  MESSAGE e398(00) WITH 'Message shown but buggy detail popup shows' 'TD600 and ABAP source code shown is' 'MESSAGE e600(td)' INTO return.

  MESSAGE e600(td) WITH '*' '*' '*' RAISING error.
ENDFUNCTION.

 

ABAP 7.40 SP 23.

Kernel 753 SP 1300.

SAP GUI 8.00.

entry.title: Re: 1 warehouse order for outbound with two activity areas
entry.content: @Christian_Ries

entry.title: Re: 1 warehouse order for outbound with two activity areas
entry.content: @Christian_Ries WHAT ACTIVITY IS THAT. WILL GET THE RESULT WE WANT WITH ONE WO WITH ALL TASK UNDER THE SAME WO

entry.title: Re: abap bug MESSAGE shows wrong ID/class/number and navi...
entry.content:
A bug for sure.

Here's one workaround which consists in sending a dummy message right before "MESSAGE 'text' TYPE ..." statement:

 

REPORT.
PARAMETERS bug    RADIOBUTTON GROUP rb1 DEFAULT 'X'.
PARAMETERS no_bug RADIOBUTTON GROUP rb1.
AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
  CASE 'X'.
    WHEN no_bug.
      MESSAGE 'Message shown and correct detail popup shows "Character String as Message" and ABAP source code shown is this line' TYPE 'E'.
    WHEN bug.
      DATA(return) = VALUE string( ).
      CALL FUNCTION 'Z_ZSRO_MESSAGE_RAISING'
        IMPORTING  return = return
        EXCEPTIONS error  = 1.
      zcl_zzsro=>dummy_message_to_fix_bug( ). "<=========== Add this
      MESSAGE return TYPE 'E'.
  ENDCASE.

 

Class/Method code:

 

CLASS zcl_zzsro DEFINITION
  PUBLIC FINAL
  CREATE PRIVATE.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS dummy_message_to_fix_bug.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zcl_zzsro IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD dummy_message_to_fix_bug.
    " This is to fix the bug described in this post:
    " https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/abap-bug-message-shows-wrong-id-class-number-and-navigate-to-wrong-source/qaq-p/14033754
    MESSAGE s001(00) INTO DATA(dummy) ##NEEDED.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

After this fix, the popup shows the right information, and the right ABAP source code position is shown:

entry.title: " Requester is not allowed for buy on behalf " - manager getting this err while creating bob sc
entry.content:
Manager is getting error while creating buy on behalf sc for his reportees. 

Error message:- requester is not allowed for buy on behalf 

My question is manager can raise sc for his reportee or not or this err is a standard one. Please let me know

entry.title: Re: Beyond Basic (2): Certificate-Based Authentication in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Meanwhile Bruno supports in the "Collection" Settings under "Client Certificates" the selection of either "Cert" (*.pem) or "PFX (*.pfx).

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Copy from Upload Version to Public Version: Overwrite issue
entry.content:
Hi, 

For better control end result - Advanced Formulas step is the best. 

For standard copy step it's designed behavior (in Advanced Formulas step the same setting is CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = ON)

If you want to save existing values and overwrite only new uploaded rows use Advanced formulas step with setting: CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = OFF

More info could be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/afe93e3cf1414a7b8419baad11cc066e.html?locale=en-US

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Using SAC Rest API Patch /api/v1/permissions - Has an...
entry.content:
As documented these are internal APIs not intended for external use. We are currently discussing whether they should be removed from the Business Accelerator Hub, or released for general use. Either way you are right in pointing out the inconsistence and we are looking at fixing it.

Did you have a specific API use case you were looking for, or were you just browsing the capabilities of our APIs?

thanks

entry.title: Does any one can help me to know where does Stock Type list gets configured in S4HANA
entry.content: I am seeing this list in here, does anyone know where does this list is configured? Please see the screen shot below

entry.title: How to publish Business Objects reports to SharePoint?
entry.content:
Is there anyways to publish Business Objects Reports to SharePoint? We would like to be able to schedule Webi reports and sent to the SharePoint location as an excel format. We are currently running BO 4.3.

I really appreciate it!

entry.title: Upgrading BW/4HANA 2.0 / BPC 11.1 to BW/4HANA 2023 / BPC 2021
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are getting started with an upgrade from BW/4HANA 2.0 with BPC 11.1 to BW/4HANA 2023 with BPC 2021 and I am struggling to find good content in regards to what needs to be done on the BPC side of things. Has anyone gone through this upgrade yet that could shine some light? Are there any special steps in regards to BPC? Do we need to uninstall the BPC 11.1 add-on? Do we need to export the environments and import them again? We use both Standard and Embedded solutions. 

 

Thanks in advance,

Cristina

entry.title: Help scroll view position app WEB
entry.content: Hello friends, how are you? I came here to this group to ask for help, I have a project in Appgyver that is divided into three containers: the first is the header, the second is one with a search field and the third is one with a scroll view. My question is the following, how do I hide the header container when I scroll the scroll view by X pixels? For example, when I scroll the scroll view by 200px the header container changes the view to false.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Tenant migration made possible
entry.content:
What if there are interdependencies between tables and APIs?

How will this work? Your proposed solution looks very fragile.

Also why is there no backup and restore from the backup option available?

This could be a simple failure recovery test.

entry.title: Tablet won't display PDF inside of an item without opening a new window or PDF viewer
entry.content:
When I add a PDF to an item with an AICC wrapper, it works fine on PC. However, when taking the item on mobile tablet, it prompts to download the PDF and open in another tab or PDF viewer app. I would like it to display natively inside of the same tab. 

More Info

  • Tablet: Zebra Technologies ET51 running Android Version 11
  • Using Microsoft Edge browser, but does the same thing in Chrome

Things I have already tried/configured

  • Enable Mobile Content checkbox is checked in the content object
  • Launch in new Window is not checked
  • In the system config, I have added PDF as an accepted file type

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Implementation: Module Sequence and Logic
entry.content: How much time are you suggesting for the implementation?  Is this a couple of week process or several weeks?

entry.title: SAP SD Consultant Aspiring
entry.content:
Hola! Estoy empezando desde cero en el mundo SAP, ya estoy tomando varios cursos para poder certificarme en el módulo de ventas, S/4HANA SALES, todos los cursos y exámenes los estoy realizando desde la plataforma SAP LEARNING HUB. Ya tengo fecha de examen de certificación.

Pero ¿qué me recomiendas para seguir creciendo, aunque estoy estudiando desde el año pasado, todo esto es nuevo para mí? ¡¡Muchas gracias!!
¿Cómo empezaste y qué consejos te hubiera gustado que te hubieran dado desde el principio?

entry.title: Issues with Installation and Uninstallation of SAP Analysis for Office
entry.content:
I am experiencing difficulties with both the installation and uninstallation of SAP Analysis for Office. The following issues have been encountered:

  1. When the user tried to install SAP Analysis for Office, the application did not appear as an Excel add-in (as shown in the attached screenshot). Additionally, when trying to launch SAP Analysis for Office from the icon on the Windows Start menu, an error message appears.



     

  2. I would like to uninstall and reinstall SAP Analysis for Office. However, when searching for "Analysis for Office" in Control Panel > Programs and Features, the application does not appear in the list of installed programs.

  3. I attempted to delete the "Analysis for Office" folder directly from the PC's Explorer and then reattempted the installation. During the installation process, the screen progresses as shown in the attached screenshot. (At this point, I select the top two checkboxes and try to proceed, but I am unable to click "Next" to continue the installation.)
    ↓The user have deleted the folder "AnalysisOffice" below

     

Could you please provide guidance on how to resolve these issues and successfully install SAP Analysis for Office?

entry.title: Re: Migration of Routes and Routes Scheduling in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Samuel, I am after similar information for the migration of routes and schedules. Did you find a solution to this?

Regards

SFC

entry.title: Re: SAP screens not detected as SAP GUI while capturing a...
entry.content:
Hi Amit,

Could you please check the following:

1. Are you both using the same user id to login to SAP?

2. If not, then could you please check the access given to the user id in SAP? Does the user id being used by you have scripting access in SAP system being captured?

3. Finally, if you use another system but with your credentials, does the issue remain?

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Does IAG support Integration with Blackline
entry.content: Hello SAP community.   Does IAG ( SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance ) support Integration with Blackline

entry.title: crystal reports 2016: merge data across two (BTrieve) databases
entry.content:
We are trying to rewrite an ancient CR 8.5 report that merges data from two BTrieve databases and it works fine, but we need to convert it to CR 2016. 

The old report used a table of "months" as the main table and that table is joined to each of the two "real" data tables, which are transactions (TRX).  One of the TRX tables resides in the same database as the "months" table and the other TRX table resides in the other database. With this structure, the report doesn't complain about "More than one datasource has been used in this report."   

However, we cannot get the same functionality in CR 2016 when going against BTrieve data. It always complains about "more than one datasource" and the data returned is a cartesian product.

We can create stored procedures and views in the BTrieve database that gives us the data using a UNION (SQL), but the BTrieve driver in CR 2016 does not allow access to stored procedures or views (sigh).

Anyone, have any ideas on a solution/workaround?

NOTE:  The application that performs all the processing and drives the reports does not use ODBC which does allow access to stored procedures and views in BTrieve files.

Thanks.     -- Paul

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: Re: selecting Multiple elements in "Set looping list" in bpa
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please try the following:

1. Step 1 would be to identify the number of times the loop needs to run or an exit condition to end the loop.

2. Step 2 would be to create either a "Repeat" loop or "Forever" loop based on whether a set number of times execution is needed or based on an exit condition the loop needs to be ended.

3. Step 3: Within the loop address each set activity for the three collections, and add the index of Step 2 loop to address the element on the current loop index.

Do let me know in case you wish for more details.

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: How to create a simple SAP GUI using SAP Process Auto...
entry.content:
Hi Madevan,

Do you intend to create the Sales Order using SAP t-code? If that is the case, have you already ruled out BAPI or oDATA approach for the same?

Any specific reasons for the same?

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Re: How Can I buy SAP SQL Anywhere 17 License
entry.content: Finally! Thank you dhkom for good news.

entry.title: SQL Anywhere Linux ODBC and TLS
entry.content:
I am setting up a Docker container to connect to a SQL Anywhere database running on the same network. I was able to get it to connect and run a query successfully when I ran the Docker container on the same machine as the database server. I am using the sql Anywhere Linux ODBC client software and unixodbc.

This is the odbc.ini that works when the container is ran on the same machine:

 

[ODBC Data Sources]
Prototype = SQL Anywhere 17

[Prototype]
Driver=/opt/sqlanywhere17/lib64/libdbodbc17.so
Description=Some Database
Host=192.168.1.11:2638
DatabaseName=databasename
ServerName=servername
UID=username
Integrated=NO
Encryption=SIMPLE
Password=password

 

Here is how the database is sarted:

 

[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Services\SQLANYs_testdb\Parameters]
"Parameters"="-k -qi -qs -on 10m -o C:\\CPDB\\console.txt -ti240 -tl120 -gnh 500 -gl ALL -gd ALL -x tcpip(ServerPort=2636,2638) -xs HTTPS(PORT=2637;IDENTITY=c:\\somefolder\\odbc.id;IDENTITY_PASSWORD=test) -es -ec SIMPLE,TLS(IDENTITY=c:\\somefolder\\odbc.id;IDENTITY_PASSWORD=test) -n test C:\\CPDB\\test.db @c:\\somefolder\\.tekey"

 

I am assuming that this works because it is on the same machine and it uses Encryption=SIMPLE. When I run this Docker image on a different machine on the same network with this odbc.ini:

 

[ODBC Data Sources]
Prototype = SQL Anywhere 17

[Prototype]
Driver=/opt/sqlanywhere17/lib64/libdbodbc17.so
Description=Some Database
Host=192.168.1.11:2638
DatabaseName=databasename
ServerName=servername
UID=username
Integrated=NO
Encryption=TLS(trusted_certificates=*)
Password=password

 

When I run:

 

ODBCTRACE=1 ODBCTRACEMODE=console isql -v Prototype

 

I get:

 

[08S01][unixODBC][SAP][ODBC Driver][SQL Anywhere]TLS handshake failure
[ISQL]ERROR: Could not SQLConnect

 

Here is what the public key looks like minus sensitive details:

 

Certificate:
    Data:
        Version: 3 (0x2)
        Serial Number:
            <omitted>
        Signature Algorithm: sha256WithRSAEncryption
        Issuer: C=US, ST=UT, L=Somewhere, O=Org, OU=Database, CN=*.somecompany.com, emailAddress=DatabaseTeam@test.com
        Validity
            Not Before: Feb 28 17:52:02 2024 GMT
            Not After : Feb 15 17:52:02 2074 GMT
        Subject: C=US, ST=UT, L=Somewhere, O=Org, OU=Database, CN=*.somecompany.com, emailAddress=DatabaseTeam@test.com
        Subject Public Key Info:
            Public Key Algorithm: rsaEncryption
                Public-Key: (2048 bit)
                Modulus:
                    <omitted>
                Exponent: 65537 (0x10001)
        X509v3 extensions:
            X509v3 Subject Key Identifier: 
                <omitted>
    Signature Algorithm: sha256WithRSAEncryption
    Signature Value:
        <omitted>

 


Where can I find the different options that can be used for TLS(...) in the odbc.ini file ?

And does anyone have any suggestions on how I can troubleshoot this ? I think I am just not getting the TLS configured correctly in the odbc.ini.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content: thanks 🙂

entry.title: Re: difference in asset report & g.l account balance
entry.content:
Hi All, I had the same issue and I took sometime to fix it.

I then understood that, asset reports work based on asset value date and GL reports based on posting date.

It is worth checking if any settlement was done (example, cost object to AUC or FA) with posting date previous month but AstValue date (BSEG-BZDAT) in current month. 

To obtain all docs for these asset posting, I had checked first BSEG table with BUKRS, GJAHR and BZDAT (note, value and ast value dates are different). then passing all these to BKPF, I understood, only two docs type PS and AA. So I then run BKPF with posting date of these two months to know if any postings are falling under Asset value date of different month. Do not forget that BSEG has no plus /minus sign so consider D/C-S/H indicator while totaling or do subtotal on D/C. It resolved my issue.

Thanks.

Sachin.

entry.title: Re: Difference in Balance between in Asset Register & GL...
entry.content:
Hi All, I had the same issue and I took sometime to fix it.

I then understood that, asset reports work based on asset value date and GL reports based on posting date.

It is worth checking if any settlement was done (example, cost object to AUC or FA) with posting date previous month but AstValue date (BSEG-BZDAT) in current month. 

To obtain all docs for these asset posting, I had checked first BSEG table with BUKRS, GJAHR and BZDAT (note, value and ast value dates are different). then passing all these to BKPF, I understood, only two docs type PS and AA. So I then run BKPF with posting date of these two months to know if any postings are falling under Asset value date of different month. Do not forget that BSEG has no plus /minus sign so consider D/C-S/H indicator while totaling or do subtotal on D/C. It resolved my issue.

Thanks.

Sachin.

entry.title: Re: Difference between GL a/c balance & asset balance report
entry.content:
Hi All, I had the same issue and I took sometime to fix it.

I then understood that, asset reports work based on asset value date and GL reports based on posting date.

It is worth checking if any settlement was done (example, cost object to AUC or FA) with posting date previous month but AstValue date (BSEG-BZDAT) in current month. 

To obtain all docs for these asset posting, I had checked first BSEG table with BUKRS, GJAHR and BZDAT (note, value and ast value dates are different). then passing all these to BKPF, I understood, only two docs type PS and AA. So I then run BKPF with posting date of these two months to know if any postings are falling under Asset value date of different month. Do not forget that BSEG has no plus /minus sign so consider D/C-S/H indicator while totaling or do subtotal on D/C. It resolved my issue.

Thanks.

Sachin.

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content:
Hi Marie, there seems to be another change applied, to the product, this was working last week, but now when i run the "update record function", which references a UUID in an application variable to select the record and post an update to the record i get the following error "{"code":"requestFailed","status":404,"message":"Request failed with status code 404","rawError":"<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <title>Error</title> </head> <body> <pre>Cannot POST /destinations_api/v2/destination/SAP-Build-Apps-Runtime/projects/04c5908a-10c8-484f-96ed-547792348fff/entity/PocSaPprojectsinitial</pre> </body> </html> "}"
@Dan_Wroblewski , @MarieDuffy 

I havent made any changes to the app, so it seems like another backend database change driving the error.  The error message is triggered, but the create record function is actually successful so i can see the update has written to the database succssfully. 

The logic flow now stops at the error message, but to work around it i now link the error message path to the next step, so it forces the next step to continue.  So i think the error message is triggering incorrectly for some reason, and the positive create record path is stopping incorrectly.

entry.title: Re: OCC extension and cache manager
entry.content: Eric, have you done anything different than what the documentation suggest? It is not working for me. What's more, it is breaking the DefaultDataMapper class which is using the DefaultFieldSetBuilder.createFieldSet annoted with Cacheable on the fieldSetCache. Are you including your custom and OOTB caches in the ehcache.xml? My custom cache is not available.

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration- Working with Number Ranges
entry.content: Can you also show how to update them in an iFlow.   This would be done via the PUT and the payload from the GET with the adjusted <CurrentValue>.      I am getting an Unauthorized Error when I attempt the PUT

entry.title: Extending Server-Side Caching not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to add a custom cache for my OCC controller and followed the instructions provided in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/e1391e5265574bfbb56ca4c0573ba1dc/00acb76c665940c498e49120eae740bc.html?locale=en-.

However, I am out of luck. The custom cache I have created is not accessible from my code. Also, it is breaking the DefaultFieldSetBuilder.createFieldSet method (using @Cacheable on fieldSetCache) which is used by the DefaultDataMapper.

I don't know if I need to do anything extra than what the article suggests. How can I add my own cache while preserving the OOTB caches.

entry.title: Re: No item displayed in My Inbox in Workzone
entry.content:
Hi Jayanth,

Could you please confirm if both the BPA and My Inbox application are being executed on the same sub-account?

Also, do you see the work item, if you change the recipient mapping by hard-coding the email address of the id being used for testing?

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Do you need to set up a sales area for a material of you are only ordering it and not selling it ?
entry.content:
Use Case

We want to create Materials to Purchase and distribute to plants ( which exist ) via STO. Sales will be done using existing sales areas. Can this be done or if we STO we need a Sales area ? 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: CK13N different time values are displayed
entry.content: we can see 72442 - Unit conversion in product costing The unit of measurement used is that of the activity type, for example, H. The system now attempts to convert all the units of measurement to H. However, there are two exceptions: 1. If the value exceeds the field size (field overflow), the next highest unit of measurement is used, for example, DAY. 2. If the conversion causes rounding errors higher than one thousandth, for example, 29 MIN = 0.483333...H, the next lowest unit of measurement (in this case, MIN) is used. See Note 62919 for more information.

entry.title: Re: SAP analytics cloud upload job starter not appearing in story editor
entry.content: I would say so

entry.title: F-90 with posting key 70 to Asset AUC . ERROR "Acquisition value negative in Area 01"
entry.content:
Dear SAPGurus,

i had a case when i post asset AUC in F-90.

When i post or simulate, it show ERROR "Acquisition value negative in Area 01"

I Attach the data that i post in F-90

I read some post that the solution is to tick the "Negative Value Allowed" using AS02 in depreciation Area

what I want to ask is , why when in posting key 70 - we entered the value for asset AUC with a positive value but SAP said  "Acquisition value was negative in Area 01" ? 

Could you tell me the root cause ?

For the information.  asset value for asset 911000112 is still plenty

entry.title: Re: Create one or more projects for Migration Cockpit for...
entry.content:
Hello Ebba,

It's not necessary to create only one migration project for all your rollouts, especially the rollouts will take 2 years to complete. The migration object templates will probably change during the 2 years, then you will have to update the templates, which makes you difficult to maintain and track the status.

So, you can create separate migration project for each rollout. And you can even create several migration projects during one rollout. The field mappings are based on project level, meaning you don't need to maintain the field mapping again within the same project. If you create a new migration project, you need to maintain the field mapping. That's the main difference.

Thanks

Vincent

entry.title: 台湾地区统一发票在 SAP ERP 公有云系统中的实施方案建议
entry.content:
在数字化时代，电子发票已成为企业提升流程效率和合规的重要工具。作为专注于 SAP ERP 公有云的解决方案架构师，基于丰富的项目参与经验，本文提供关于台湾地区统一发票管理的深入洞见，旨在帮助企业用户充分利用 SAP 产品实现统一发票的数字化管理。

电子发票流程的必要性

根据台湾财政部的法规，电子发票已被推荐作为统一发票标准格式。SAP ERP 公有云产品提供强大的支持，成为企业在数字化转型中不可或缺的组成部分。在众多实施项目中，企业面临的挑战通常在于如何有效整合电子发票到现有系统及流程中。为确保从纸质到电子系统的过渡顺利，建议采用分阶段实施策略。

理解并优化现有发票流程

在许多企业中，纸质发票的管理常常带来操作上的繁琐以及高错误率。当企业定制化的系统流程与功能中涉及纸质发票流程时，可能会遇到以下问题：

  • 整合难度：纸质和电子发票在系统层面的整合可能涉及多个系统之间的信息同步和数据转换，增加了技术复杂性。
  • 效率低下：处理纸质发票通常需要人工干预，如扫描和手动数据输入，这可能导致效率降低。
  • 错误风险：手动过程中容易出现数据错误，可能导致财务报表的不准确。

建议企业选择分开管理纸质和电子发票，并逐步推广至全电子化进程。基于对 SAP ERP 公有云的深入认识，系统中的严谨配置和测试至关重要，以防止发生发票号码等关键数据整合问题。

处理停用的电子计算机统一发票

自2021年以来，电子计算机统一发票已经停止适用，参考台湾当地财政部税务署公告。停止适用后，为了管理和查阅历史交易数据，SAP 系统中仍可能出现与电子计算机发票相关的税码设置。为了防止错误使用停用的税码，项目顾问需要利用税条件类型的设置，限制用户只能选择当前实际适用的销项税码。将客户税分类码进行调整，如用“E”来对应电子发票税码，以替代传统设计的“1”税码，是一个有效的解决方案。

电子发票功能的全面展望

SAP ERP 公有云提供一整套电子发票标准税码，以协助企业满足多样化的税务需求：

  • A5：零税率销售，如出口商品。
  • A6：针对境内一般课税。
  • A7：境内零税。
  • A8：境内免税/免开立电子发票销售。
  • A9：用于境内特殊税率。

在设计和实施这些功能时，建议企业激活 5XU 范围项目，并参考以下的配置指南，以确保最大化利用这一数字化工具：

  • 客户（销售）电子发票相关配置指南
  • 电子发票类型与编码配置指南
  • VAT 申报配置指南
  • 营业场所配置指南

预备未来的发票标准

根据电子发票数据交换标准信息构建指引(MIG)，从2026年起，电子发票需遵循 MIG4.1 标准。当前，SAP 的系统版本支持 MIG4.0 标准，产品研发团队已经积极应对更新法规的要求，未来的系统更新已列入日程。建议企业提前规划，以便顺利适应法规变更。

免开立电子发票的场景处理

依据统一发票使用办法第四条，某些免税商品可免开立统一发票。在这些情况下，SAP 标准流程并不会自动阻止电子发票的生成。因此，项目可通过增强 BADI EDOC_TW_IS_RELEVANT 实现定制化逻辑，以条件性地抑制电子发票的生成，从而满足业务需求。

多元税码场景的应对方法

随着 MIG4.0 标准的启动，“F0401 平台存证开立发票”可在同一张凭证中包含应税与免税或零税率的项目。SAP ERP 公有云自 2502 版本起支持混合税率的电子发票。这意味着，在同一张凭证中可以包含应税与免税或零税率的项目。企业可以利用此功能实现更多样的发票处理模式。详细说明参见 Multiple Tax | SAP What's New Viewer。

但若企业管理的需求仍需对不同税率单独开票，有两种方案可预期实现：

  • 流程控制：规范操作流程，确保同一销售订单仅限使用同一税率，从根源上预防混合税率情况。
  • 技术增强：使用 BADI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER 实施定制化逻辑，在销售请款凭证生成时，按税码拆分请款凭证。需注意，根据 SAP 的设计，电子发票凭证需与销售请款凭证保持一一对应关系。详细参见 Forcing a Billing Document Split。

集成加值中心与 VAT 申报

在某些项目中，部分企业选择通过加值中心进行 VAT 申报，这涉及如何将 SAP 系统的电子发票数据有效推送至增值中心。由于不同加值中心对电子信息交互的要求略有差异，SAP 无法提供统一的解决方案符合所有加值中心的要求，因此需定制化开发以匹配不同加值中心的技术需求，确保准确数据传输与合规。

项目实施可通过销售流程凭证的相关 CDS 视图读取数据，并整合为电子发票申报集成所需的数据格式。以下博客详细阐述了一个实施实例：嵌入式 SAC 客户用例分享之加值中心集成（台湾地区本地化需求）。若您期望 SAP 能通过标准产品内容提供统合的台湾电子发票 CDS 视图，欢迎您通过贵司的 S-User 访问 Release Unified CDS Views for Taiwan e-Invoice Data Export and Integrations | SAP Customer Influence Portal，投出您宝贵的一票。

结语

通过这些洞见，企业在统一发票的数字化管理旅程中能够获得新的视角和实用策略。成功的电子发票应用促进业务流程改进，提升合规性，也是企业数字化中不可忽视的环节。欲进一步详细了解 SAP 台湾电子发票标准方案，欢迎参考SAP Document Compliance 台湾电子发票解决方案。

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: I am interested. Please consider me if any dropout. Thank you!
